programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Unlikely Killers
programme.desc: Lions, cheetahs and crocodiles are the best-known dangerous inhabitants of Africa.However, in the program we will look at killers who do not reveal their true intentions in any way.

programme.title: The Hidden World of Snakes: Season 1
programme.desc: The fates of people and snakes have been intertwined for centuries.Vast areas of the Americas and Australia are inhabited by poisonous vipers and powerful constrictors.In North and South America, over thirty species of rattlesnakes regulate the number of rodents, guarding the local ecosystems.Australian waters are home to deadly sea snakes, and the land is home to the Australian taipan, known for its exceptionally strong venom.From dense forests to deserts, these continents are home to the world's most fascinating and deadly predators.

programme.title: Europe From Above 5
programme.desc: The Old Continent seen from an extraordinary perspective.A bird's eye view will allow you to discover architectural treasures as well as natural gems.Europe will also be shown during different seasons.

programme.title: Incredible Dr. Pol 7
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the lives of many animals.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: Incredible Dr. Pol 7
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He saved the lives of many animals.He is helped every day by his colleagues who are willing to make sacrifices.

programme.title: Secrets of the Penguins
programme.desc: For two years, National Geographic explorer Bertie Gregory closely studied the tight-knit communities of some of the world's most intelligent penguins.He documented behaviors and situations that had previously been difficult to capture on camera.The series proves that penguins are much closer to humans than was previously known.These unique flightless birds are brave and adventurous, and at the same time value family bonds and friendship.Thanks to their ingenuity, they can survive in the most extreme conditions 20 years have passed since the premiere of the Oscar-winning "March of the Penguins".The three-part documentary series rediscovers the world of the inhabitants of the most hostile regions of the world.Today, groundbreaking technologies and scientific work allow us to look at flightless birds from a previously unavailable perspective.One of the guides to the penguin kingdom is Bertie Gregory, who camped with the team near the emperor penguin colony in Antarctica.The superhuman effort resulted in the recording of scenes that humans had never seen before.The most important thing is family. The first heroes of the bird saga are the largest representatives of the family - emperor penguins.For the first time, a television crew recorded an astonishing acrobatic display with their participation: hundreds of chicks of this species jumping from a 50-meter cliff into the icy ocean.Researchers also looked at the bonds between families, friends and strangers.In extreme conditions, social skills mean the difference between life and death.The cameras also included rockhopper, gentoo and golden-crested penguins.Filmmakers have discovered surprising behaviors of animals that can cooperate, take risks and even rebel.

programme.title: Secrets of the Octopus
programme.desc: We discover eight different species of octopuses in the depths of the sea.Each has a unique personality and great intelligence.Despite drastic differences, these animals turn out to be surprisingly similar to humans.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: There are places with extremely difficult conditions.Living there requires a constant fight for survival, adapting to fierce frosts, heat, storms, snowstorms and heavy rainfall.Access to these areas is often difficult.The situation is worsened by climate change and rare weather events that have impacted many species.The extraordinary cinematography by Guillermo Navarro, who won an Oscar for "Pan's Labyrinth", will better show this intriguing world where danger lurks at every step.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: There are places with extremely difficult conditions.Living there requires a constant fight for survival, adapting to fierce frosts, heat, storms, snowstorms and heavy rainfall.Access to these areas is often difficult.The situation is worsened by climate change and rare weather events that have impacted many species.The extraordinary cinematography by Guillermo Navarro, who won an Oscar for "Pan's Labyrinth", will better show this intriguing world where danger lurks at every step.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Woodlands
programme.desc: Eucalyptus forests are a refuge for parrots and platypuses.These vast areas are also inhabited by tree kangaroos.It turns out that the future of the ancient antipodean ecosystem is uncertain.

programme.title: America The Beautiful: Wild Frontier
programme.desc: A documentary series devoted to the American border and its nature.The program presents the legends of the Wild West, which are intertwined with stories about local animal species.

programme.title: Gorongosa: Paradise Reborn
programme.desc: Gorongosa National Park located in central Mozambique was considered an African paradise.However, fifteen years of civil war in this country turned this place into a real hell.Bloody fighting took place on its territory, and lions, cheetahs, buffaloes, hippos and other species were decimated.An action is underway to restore the animal population.Only a few of them managed to survive the slaughter.This group includes the elephant Mwana Nzo.Her fate becomes the background of a dramatic story about an African park.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: Animals use camouflage, mimicry and deception just to survive another day.The tiger can perfectly blend into the background and approach its prey unnoticed, using its beautiful, striped and orange color.We know of a spider that imitates an ant so perfectly that it sneaks into the colony without much effort.A bird raises a false alarm to force scared meerkats to abandon their prey.There are no creatures in nature without knowledge of the art of deception and manipulation.

programme.title: Soul of the Ocean
programme.desc: Howard Hall, who specializes in underwater films, will use spectacular shots of the sea depths to present the complex ecosystems in the oceans.It will show the interdependencies between species of aquatic creatures.

programme.title: Sea of Hope: America's Underwater Treasures
programme.desc: Marine biologist Sylvia Earl, together with photographer Brian Skerry and writer Max Kennedy, explore the wonderful world of the oceans and try to protect undersea habitats.

programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Schroeder run a veterinary clinic in Nebraska.They passionately fight for the health of animals in the local community.

programme.title: Europe From Above 5
programme.desc: The Old Continent seen from an extraordinary perspective.A bird's eye view will allow you to discover architectural treasures as well as natural gems.Europe will also be shown during different seasons.

programme.title: America the Beautiful: Mighty Northwest
programme.desc: The Cascade Mountains located in the USA are among the most dangerous regions in North America.Among their peaks you can find as many as 13 volcanoes, 7 of which have erupted in the last 300 years.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom: Uprising
programme.desc: The film is dedicated to a lion named Sekekama.He is the undisputed leader of the pack.However, to maintain power, he must defend his throne against his rivals.These are three eastern princes who want to rule the entire territory.They are ready to overthrow the current king, and each of them may pose a real threat to his position.A new, powerful empire is also created by the dangerous Queens of the North.Three lionesses were once expelled from the pride, and now they tirelessly plan bloody revenge on their enemies.Meanwhile, the lioness Saba struggles with a personal tragedy.At the same time, she constantly works to ensure that the only son she has will follow the path she has set In distant Botswana, a fierce battle between the lion dynasty is taking place.Animals conspire, plot, plan coups, commit treason and protect their heirs with dedication.The four-episode documentary series brings to mind dramas whose heroes are people.On the African plains, the story of kings, their traitorous sons and mysterious avengers comes to life.The background of the bloody games are stunning landscapes, captured using the latest filming technology.Viewers can see both lightning in the stormy sky above the plain and individual dewdrops on the lion's mane.Game of Thrones One of the main characters of this story, created five years ago, is the aging lion Sekekama.He must constantly guard his position in the herd.He has enemies even among his descendants.In addition, warrior lionesses appeared on the outskirts of his territory, which the authors of the document called the Queens of the North.Three females and eight cubs are able to create a new dynasty that will take over the area.Saba the leopard will also play an important role in the whole story, as she tries to instill the hunter's instinct in her son and teaches him the art of killing.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom: Uprising
programme.desc: The film is dedicated to a lion named Sekekama.He is the undisputed leader of the pack.However, to maintain power, he must defend his throne against his rivals.These are three eastern princes who want to rule the entire territory.They are ready to overthrow the current king, and each of them may pose a real threat to his position.A new, powerful empire is also created by the dangerous Queens of the North.Three lionesses were once expelled from the pride, and now they tirelessly plan bloody revenge on their enemies.Meanwhile, the lioness Saba struggles with a personal tragedy.At the same time, she constantly works to ensure that the only son she has will follow the path she has set.

programme.title: Wild, Smart and Deadly
programme.desc: Animals use camouflage, mimicry and deception just to survive another day.The tiger can perfectly blend into the background and approach its prey unnoticed, using its beautiful, striped and orange color.We know of a spider that imitates an ant so perfectly that it sneaks into the colony without much effort.A bird raises a false alarm to force scared meerkats to abandon their prey.There are no creatures in nature without knowledge of the art of deception and manipulation.

programme.title: Soul of the Ocean
programme.desc: Howard Hall, who specializes in underwater films, will use spectacular shots of the sea depths to present the complex ecosystems in the oceans.It will show the interdependencies between species of aquatic creatures.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Season 5
programme.desc: At the Critter Fixer clinic, doctors are fighting for the life of a critically ill dog and treating another animal that requires a complicated procedure to remove a record number of kidney stones.In the meantime, an injured wild turtle is given a chance to survive.Veterinarians also cannot ignore their regular patient, Bear the cat, who also needs help.The team also has to take care of a Belgian giant, a colorful conure parrot, a hen that can't lay an egg, and a pair of adorable kittens.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines
programme.desc: The creators of the documentary go to the Philippines.It is a country inhabited by over 100 million people and has over 7,600 islands, only a small part of which is inhabited.In the waters of the Pacific Ocean you can find coral reefs full of life.They are an ideal shelter for various animal species.An unprecedented wealth of fauna and flora can be found in the local equatorial forests.They also include numerous endemic species.In this delightful world, each island of the archipelago is different and hides phenomenal secrets.

programme.title: Europe From Above 2
programme.desc: Continuation of the sky expedition over the Old Continent.In the second series you will be able to admire, among others:the Greek Acropolis or the great icebreakers in Finland.

programme.title: Dr K's Exotic Animal ER 3
programme.desc: Dr. K detects intestinal problems in the miniature rabbit Pixel and orders a CT scan.Webster, a 29-year-old common macaw, has vision problems.The parrot's eye needs to be removed.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken, among others, in the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed Life on Earth exists thanks to the atmosphere, which appears to people in space as a thin blue layer.An extraordinary chain of relationships leads to the production of oxygen, the most abundant element on the planet.Disrupting the delicate balance can leave living creatures unable to breathe.The creators of the series will talk about surprising phenomena - a sandstorm covering almost the entire world, the Amazon and its sky rivers, the power hidden by glaciers and single-celled algae - diatoms.

programme.title: Snake City: Snakes in the City Beyond the Venom Compilation Season 7
programme.desc: There are over 25 species of snakes in Durban and Simon, Sioux and Mbali have to deal with many of them.

programme.title: Alaska's Grizzly Gauntlet
programme.desc: Prince William Sound is home to black bears.Three thousand individuals live there, and over 100,000 in the entire territory of Alaska.Survivalist Les Stroud will take a closer look at them, and what's more, he will come face to face with them.However, before he decides to meet, he must learn more about the habits of the subjects of his research.He will be helped by someone who knows everything about the local flora and fauna.Stroud's guide spent decades observing black bears.Thanks to it, the traveler will learn what dangers he may encounter after crossing the borders of the kingdom of these predators.The expedition begins when they are preparing for the arrival of winter.They need to increase their weight because the additional protective layer is useful in hostile weather conditions.Bears are looking for food, but if they choose the wrong place, they are in serious danger.First of all, they must be vigilant - every rustle means that an unwanted companion has appeared.Viewers will see how predators deal with them.It is also worth mentioning that these animals want to be left in peace wherever they are.This is why Stroud does not enter their lairs, because a confrontation may prove painful.

programme.title: Ocean with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Renowned British naturalist Sir David Attenborough recently celebrated his 99th birthday.For several decades, he has been popularizing knowledge about the Blue Planet and drawing attention to the need to protect disappearing worlds.Oceans have a special place in his mission.In the document, which is a visual feast, it presents unusual forms of life hidden in the depths inaccessible to humans.Using new filming technologies, it takes viewers to amazing places.Warns against the threats related to climate change.It also shows how fishing devastates aquatic ecosystems.However, his message is not without hope.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.
